privileged_info_summary: The manuscript timeline validator task uses synthetic data consisting of 45 unique scenes (46 rows due to duplicated Scene 12) from a mystery novel spanning 12 chapters. Three conflicts are intentionally planted: Scene 12 features Sarah simultaneously at two locations (Airport Terminal and Precinct) at 2024-03-15 21:00; Scene 23 has Marcus as the POV character but missing from the Characters Present list; Scene 31 shows a timeline reversal where the timestamp (17:30) occurs before Scene 30 (18:00) within Chapter 8, without being marked as a flashback. The data includes 7 columns (Scene #, Chapter, Timestamp, POV Character, Location, Characters Present, Scene Type) with timestamps in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM format. At least one flashback scene (Scene 8) is included. Verification requires detecting all 3 planted conflicts through spreadsheet formulas with no more than 1-2 false positives, achieving an 80% pass threshold (4 out of 5 criteria).
